report.title: Good Morning Nikhil - Design & Narrative Coherence Report
report.executiveSummary: All 4 focus areas addressed. Design tokens centralized in CSS, segment identity established via CSS variables, transitions harmonized with canonical duration scale, and timing rationale documented. 103/109 tests pass (6 pre-existing). TypeScript compiles clean. Audio gaps identified for future TTS generation.

auditFindings.criticalIssue: Show segments lacked distinct UI theming - all used same yellow accent

changes: Exported EASE_OUT constant for shared use
Added NEEDS_BUFFER_PAIRS for emotional intensity transitions
Buffer transitions use DRAMATIC timing (0.5s) vs standard SCREEN (0.3s)
Registered segment colors in Tailwind theme for utility classes
Created SEGMENT_SPOTLIGHTS config map for centralized color management
Added getSegmentKey helper for screen-to-segment mapping
Replaced 7 hardcoded rgba() colors with var(--segment-*) references
Segment spotlight positions configured per show (center, top, bottom)
Identified fatigue danger zones (intro-instructions, commercial-why, shark-reason)
Mapped engagement peaks (gmn-feud-kickoff, bachelor-limo, shark-invest, maury)

emotionalArcAnalysis.arcShape: Setup → Humor → Tension → Vulnerability → Catharsis → Resolution

audioGeneration.need: Steve VO delivering instructions in character
Steve reaction audio based on invest/pass choice

structuralConsiderations: Consider merging commercial-why into commercial-break to reduce fatigue valley
Replace third 'Fast Money?' reference in producer-notes
technicalDebt: Address Tailwind v4 @utility nesting build error
Update test selectors for anonymous toggle switch

markdown:
# Good Morning Nikhil - Design & Narrative Coherence Report

## Executive Summary

All 4 focus areas addressed. Design tokens centralized, segment identity established, transitions harmonized, timing documented.

## Key Improvements

1. **Visual Transitions**: Canonical DURATION scale, buffer transitions for emotional peaks
2. **Typography/Layout**: 25+ CSS tokens added (segments, spacing, radius, timing, easing)
3. **Segment Identity**: Hardcoded colors → CSS variables in ScreenPlayer
4. **Audio/VO Pacing**: Timing rationale documented, audio gaps identified

## Validation

- Tests: 103/109 passing (94.5%)
- TypeScript: Clean
- Pre-existing failures: 6

## Next Steps

1. Generate TTS audio for intro-instructions, shark-reason, post-credits
2. Consider merging commercial-why into commercial-break
3. Address Tailwind v4 build error
